calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-29-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-29-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Trina Ayala
Atty. Cindy Lee, Esq. for for Plaintiff: .
Plaintiff's Witness: Lorece Lundy, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: CLAUDIUS FRANCIS .
EXH.1 - Lease/Rental Agreement -------------------ID/EVID.
EXH.2 - 14-Day Notice to Quit ---------------------ID/EVID.
EXH.3- Declaration of service- - - - - - - - - - -ID/EVID
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority and against the Defendant CLAUDIUS FRANCIS as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at
1776 SUNNYDALE AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
PRINCIPAL - $5,968.27 (BACK RENT)
COST - $200.00
TOTAL JUDGMENT - $6,168.27
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-25-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: Anna Redigonda

Matter comes on calendar for UD settlement conference.
Appearance by Plaintiff's counsel Arnold Evje.
No appearance by Defendant Claudius Francis in Pro Per.

Settlement Conference is ordered off calendar.
Matter remains on Trial Calendar.

(Not reported)
